tools.name: compute_health
tools.description: Health and configuration details for this local compute MCP server.

tools.description: Execute a command synchronously with constrained binaries and capture logs.

tools.description: Start a background command and return a job id for later polling.

tools.description: Get status for a compute job id.

tools.description: Return the tail of a compute job log file.

tools.description: List recent compute jobs.

tools.name: compute_cancel_job
tools.description: Terminate a background job by PID if still running.
